member.name: T:Xml2Doc.Sample.AliasingPlayground
member.summary: Types used to validate token-aware aliasing.

member.name: M:Xml2Doc.Sample.AliasingPlayground.UseComparer(System.StringComparer)
member.summary: Accepts a non-aliased BCL type that contains "String" as a substring. Used to ensure token-aware aliasing does not transform "StringComparer".

member.name: M:Xml2Doc.Sample.AliasingPlayground.Mix(System.String,System.Int32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Mixes aliasable tokens with non-aliasable substrings so the renderer aliases true tokens while leaving larger identifiers intact.

member.name: T:Xml2Doc.Sample.XItem
member.summary: Types used to exercise nested generic signatures in XML docs.

member.name: T:Xml2Doc.Sample.GenericPlayground
member.summary: Generic playground for exercising nested generic parameter lists.

member.name: M:Xml2Doc.Sample.GenericPlayground.Flatten(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Xml2Doc.Sample.XItem}})
member.summary: Flattens a nested sequence.
member.remarks: This used to surface a stray brace in signatures like IEnumerable{IEnumerable{XItem}}. The renderer must output IEnumerable<IEnumerable<XItem>> (no extra }). See also .

member.name: M:Xml2Doc.Sample.GenericPlayground.Index(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Xml2Doc.Sample.XItem}})
member.summary: Builds an index over a nested structure.
member.remarks: Signature includes Dictionary{string, List{XItem}} which must render as Dictionary<string, List<XItem>> (no stray braces).

member.name: M:Xml2Doc.Sample.GenericPlayground.Transform``2(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{``0,System.Collections.Generic.List{``1}}})
member.summary: Tests generic method arity formatting and nested generic parameters.

member.name: T:Xml2Doc.Sample.Mathx
member.summary: Math helpers for demos.

member.name: M:Xml2Doc.Sample.Mathx.AddAlias(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Alias that calls .

member.name: M:Xml2Doc.Sample.Mathx.Add(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Add two integers.

member.name: M:Xml2Doc.Sample.Mathx.Add(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Add three integers.

member.name: T:Xml2Doc.Sample.HTTP_Parser_v2
member.summary: Demonstration types whose names exercise different slug/anchor algorithms (Default, Github/Gfm, Kramdown).
member.remarks:
Each class name intentionally includes characters or patterns that various slug generators treat differently:
Mixed case + underscores + digits ().
Nested type (introduces a '+' in doc IDs) with generic arity and double underscores ().
Sequences of underscores in a single identifier ().
Diacritics / accented characters ().
Plain ASCII baseline ().
Use these to visually compare generated anchors under different AnchorAlgorithm values.

member.name: M:Xml2Doc.Sample.HTTP_Parser_v2.Go
member.summary: Trivial member; included so the type has at least one documented method anchor.

member.name: T:Xml2Doc.Sample.Outer
member.summary: Outer container used solely to introduce a nested type (inner doc IDs use '+' between type names).

member.name: T:Xml2Doc.Sample.Outer.Inner_Type__Beta2`1
member.summary: Nested generic type showcasing double underscores, digits, and a generic placeholder.
member.typeparam: Generic type parameter (unused; present to show generic arity in anchors).

member.name: M:Xml2Doc.Sample.Outer.Inner_Type__Beta2`1.M
member.summary: Dummy method; exists to produce a member anchor within a nested generic type context.

member.name: T:Xml2Doc.Sample.Name__With__Many___Underscores
member.summary: Type with multiple sequential underscore runs to highlight compression / preservation differences across slug algorithms.

member.name: P:Xml2Doc.Sample.Name__With__Many___Underscores.X
member.summary: Simple auto-property; value irrelevant, present only to add a property anchor.

member.name: T:Xml2Doc.Sample.RésuméParser
member.summary: Contains diacritics (e.g. 'é', 'ú') which some algorithms strip (GitHub/Gfm/Kramdown) but the Default may reduce differently.

member.name: T:Xml2Doc.Sample.SimpleType
member.summary: Plain ASCII identifier serving as a control sample (all algorithms produce identical slugs).
